candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if a more specific interest expense line is unavailable in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most specific main interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific component of interest expense, not the full interest expense line; not preferred for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component, not the main reported interest expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Used the most specific main interest expense line first, with Finance costs as fallback for possible reporting-label changes.
